name: helios-github-mcp-readiness
tokenSource: GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable or GitHub Actions runtime token
recommendedScopes: pull_requests:write only when applying PR body updates
notes: Do not commit MCP tokens or generated client configuration containing secrets.
Use official GitHub authentication flows; this repo only reports readiness and commands.
Remote MCP gateway URLs can be represented by GITHUB_MCP_SERVER_URL when available.
